    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    BudgetCalculationService
    Provides business logic for budget calculations.
    BudgetController
    Controller class responsible for managing budget cycles and expense operations.
    BudgetCycle
    Represents a budgeting cycle for the user.
    category
    Represents the available expense categories in the system.
    connection
    Utility class responsible for managing the database connection.
    DashboardController
    Controller class responsible for handling dashboard-related operations.
    DatabaseSetup
    Responsible for initializing the database schema.
    Datapersistance
    Provides database persistence operations for the application.
    expense
    Represents a single expense transaction recorded by the user.
    IPersistence
    Defines the contract for persistence operations in the system.
    Main
     
    NotificationController
    Controller responsible for handling budget notifications based on spending thresholds.
    OneTimeSetup
    One-time database initialization utility.
    TestDB
     
    user
    Represents a user of the budgeting system.
